landing.headline: Got a code? Drop it in.
landing.subhead: Type the six letters your host shared and you're in.
landing.tip: Tip — your host can also share a QR. Just point your camera at it.
landing.hostCardTitle: Run your own poll, quiz, or Q&A.
landing.hostCardBody: Build a deck in seconds, share a code, and watch live answers roll in.

home.badge: Free for everyone — no card, no expiry
home.subhead: Run a poll, ask a question, score a quiz — your audience answers from any phone. No apps, no signups, no waiting.
home.step1Title: Pick a template or generate one
home.step1Body: Start from one of our ready-to-go templates — icebreakers, retros, classroom quizzes — or describe your meeting and let AI build the deck.
home.step2Body: Klikr makes a six-character code and a QR. Your audience joins from any phone — no app, no signup, just a nickname.
home.step3Body: Bars grow, words tumble in, the leaderboard reranks — every answer hits the screen the moment it's tapped.
home.finalCtaBody: Sign in with Google. You're hosting in 30 seconds.

faq.freeA: Yes — every plan is $0 right now while we grow to 1,000 hosts. No card. No expiry. We'll tell you first when that changes and grandfather everyone in.
faq.installQ: Do my audience need to install anything?
faq.installA: No. They open klikr.app on any phone, type the code (or scan the QR), pick a nickname, and they're in. No accounts. No app store.
faq.typesA: Polls, word clouds, open-ended responses, Q&A with upvotes, ratings (1–5 or NPS 0–10), Kahoot-style quizzes with a podium, and embedded Google Slides / PowerPoint.
faq.aiQ: Can AI build my deck for me?
faq.aiA: Yes. Describe your meeting in one line — 'Q4 retro for engineering' — and Klikr generates a 3–6 slide deck you can edit, share, or present right away.
faq.compareQ: How does Klikr compare to Mentimeter or Slido?
faq.compareA: Same slide types, same live results, same templates. Pro is $4.99 vs Mentimeter Pro at $24.99 — and right now, both are $0.
faq.anonA: Yes. Audience members are identified only by the nickname they choose. Hosts can export results to CSV, Excel, or PDF whenever they want.
faq.demoQ: Can I see a demo before I sign in?
faq.demoAfter: walks through every slide format with sample audience activity. No signup needed.

about.title: Live audience engagement for a fraction of the price.
about.subtitle: The same polls, word clouds, Q&A, and quizzes you'd run on Mentimeter — for $4.99 instead of $24.99. Right now everything is free while we grow.

beliefs.title: Audiences join in seconds
beliefs.body: A six-letter code or a QR scan. No app store, no account creation, no email collection. Just a nickname and they're in.

beliefs.title: AI builds your decks
beliefs.body: Type one line — 'Q4 retro for engineering' — and your slides are ready. Edit them or present as-is.

beliefs.title: No card while we grow
beliefs.body: Every feature is unlocked until we hit 1,000 hosts. After that, $1.99 or $4.99 a month — and you'll be grandfathered in.

beliefs.title: Designed for the room
beliefs.body: The host's screen and the audience's phones stay out of each other's way. Your content takes the stage.

about.whatYouCanDo: What you can do with Klikr
doItems: Tap once, watch the room think.
The best questions float to the top.
Timed, scored, with a real podium at the end.
Bring your Google Slides or PowerPoint right into the deck.
Describe your meeting in one line. We'll build it.
about.audienceSeesIntro: From scanning the QR to seeing live results — exactly what shows up on every screen.

shots.title: Joining a session
shots.body: Your audience scans a QR or types a six-letter code. They pick a nickname. They're in.

shots.title: Live multiple choice
shots.body: Tap an option on a phone — the bar grows on the host's screen the moment it's tapped.

shots.title: Word clouds that breathe
shots.body: Words submitted from the room arrive in real time. The most popular grow biggest.

shots.title: Quizzes with a podium
shots.body: Timed questions, score for speed, top three revealed at the end with confetti.

about.compareIntro: Same slide types, same live results, same template gallery. We undercut by being smaller and AI-first.
about.ctaBody: Run the live demo — no signup needed.

features.title: Everything you can run with Klikr.
features.intro: Seven slide types your audience can answer in real time, plus the AI and branding that turn quick polls into proper presentations.

slideTypes.title: Multiple choice polls
slideTypes.body: Tap an option, watch the bar grow. The classic, instant.

slideTypes.title: Word clouds
slideTypes.body: Submit a word — popular ones get bigger. Great for icebreakers and brainstorming.

slideTypes.title: Open Q&A with upvotes
slideTypes.body: The room asks questions. The best ones float to the top.

slideTypes.title: Live quizzes
slideTypes.body: Timed questions, score for speed, top three on the podium with confetti.

slideTypes.title: Ratings and NPS
slideTypes.body: 1–5 or 0–10 with custom labels. Take the temperature in seconds.

slideTypes.title: Open-ended responses
slideTypes.body: Free text answers from anyone. See them stream in live.

slideTypes.title: Embedded slides
slideTypes.body: Drop a Google Slides or PowerPoint Web URL straight into your deck.

features.paidNoteBefore: Free while we grow to 1,000 hosts —

proExtras.title: AI deck generation
proExtras.body: Describe your meeting in one line — your slides land in seconds.

proExtras.title: AI option suggestions
proExtras.body: Out of ideas? Ask AI to fill the answer choices for any poll or quiz.

proExtras.title: Custom branding
proExtras.body: Add your logo and colors. Audience screens match your brand.

proExtras.title: Co-edit with teammates
proExtras.body: Invite colleagues to edit decks. Everyone works on the same slides.

proExtras.title: Excel + PDF exports
proExtras.body: Get a clean spreadsheet or printable report after every session.

features.ctaBody: Walk through a real session — polls, word cloud, quiz, podium — in your browser.

credits.title: AI credits
credits.intro: Each AI feature costs a few credits. Pro plans get a monthly grant; top up any time you run low.
credits.topupIntro: Buy a one-off bundle of credits. They never expire.
credits.topupNote: Top-ups will go live once we exit the free-for-all phase.

previews.title: Word clouds

previews.title: Open responses

previews.title: Quiz with podium

demo.readyBody: Pick a template — you'll be presenting in under a minute.
demo.tryBody: Sign in with Google. Free, no card, ready in 30 seconds.

templates.title: Find a template for your meeting.
templates.intro: Filter by what you're running — a retro, a quiz, an icebreaker — then change a few words. Most of these are 1–6 slides, ready in under a minute.
templates.noTemplatesFor: No templates found for "{query}". Try a different category or clear the search.
templates.noTemplates: No templates found. Try a different category or clear the search.
templates.ctaBody: Tell us what your meeting is about. Your slides will be ready in seconds.

host.metaTitle: Host with Klikr — polls, quizzes, Q&A
host.title: Live answers from every phone in the room.
host.intro: Run a poll, ask a question, score a quiz — your audience answers from any phone. No apps, no signups, no waiting.

startTiles.title: What do you want to run?
startTiles.intro: Pick a starting point. You can always change your mind.
startTiles.tile1Body: Open a ready-made template, change a couple of words, share the code.
startTiles.tile2Body: Describe the meeting — the slides arrive in a few seconds.
startTiles.tile3Body: Start a blank deck and build it your way — polls, word clouds, quizzes, Q&A, ratings.

biz.title: Get live feedback
biz.body: Invite live, anonymous feedback to know how your meeting, workshop, or training really landed.

biz.title: Make decisions
biz.body: Let the room weigh in. Run a quick poll and move forward with confidence — together.
biz.stageTitle: Which option should we ship first?

biz.title: Generate ideas
biz.body: Brainstorm with everyone in the room. Word clouds and open responses surface the best thinking.
biz.stageTitle: What should we focus on next quarter?

biz.title: Make it memorable
biz.body: Engagement that sticks. Quizzes, leaderboards, and a final podium make every session feel like an event.

edu.title: Check understanding
edu.body: Run a quick comprehension check at the end of class. Spot what stuck and what needs another pass.
edu.stageTitle: How confident are you with the topic?

edu.title: Spark discussion
edu.body: Ask an open question, watch ideas land, and pull the most interesting ones into the discussion.

edu.title: Run a fair quiz
edu.body: Timed questions with a real podium. Faster correct answers earn more points.

edu.title: Hear every voice
edu.body: Anonymous Q&A means the quietest students get heard. Upvotes float the best questions to the top.
rows: Will this be on the test?

easyToStart.intro: Choose a template, build from scratch, or prompt AI. You'll be ready to present and interact in no time, no matter where your audience is.
easyToStart.card1Body: Pick a template. Then make it your own.
easyToStart.card2Body: Prompt our AI, customize, present. Done.
easyToStart.card3Body: In the room, remote, or both — same code, every screen.

plans.title: Pick the plan that fits your room.
plans.intro: Up to a hundred people in the room? Free covers it. Bigger crowds, branding, AI? Basic or Pro. Everything is {price} right now — no card, no card-on-file games.
plans.promoRest: until we reach 1,000 hosts. No card. No expiry.
plans.freeTagline: Try Klikr forever. Great for one-off meetings and demos.
plans.basicTagline: For presenters who run sessions every week. No walls, no caps.
plans.proTagline: Most popular. Basic + AI that does the heavy lifting.
plans.featuresTitle: What you can do with AI credits
plans.featuresIntro: Pro gives you 200 credits a month — enough for ~40 full deck generations, or hundreds of smaller AI lifts. Run out? Top up any time.
plans.footerNote: Free for the first 1,000 hosts. Then we'll let you know — and grandfather everyone in.
freeFeatures: Up to 100 audience members per month
All slide types — polls, word clouds, Q&A, ratings, quizzes
Live results streamed to every screen
basicFeatures: Custom logo + brand colors (Klikr branding off)
Templates — use, save, and share with your team
10 AI credits / month — taste of Pro
proFeatures: ✨ Generate full decks from one line
✨ AI suggests poll and quiz options
✨ AI cleans up word clouds (synonym merge)

faqItems.q: Why is everything free right now?
faqItems.a: Because we're early. While we grow to 1,000 hosts, every paid feature is unlocked for everyone. When that changes, we'll tell you first and grandfather everyone who joined.

faqItems.q: How does Klikr compare to Mentimeter or Slido?
faqItems.a: Same slide types, same live results, same templates. Pro is $4.99 vs Mentimeter Pro at $24.99. We undercut on price by being smaller and AI-first.

faqItems.q: What can I do with one Pro AI credit?
faqItems.a: Suggest options for one quiz question, or recommend templates from a one-line description. Bigger AI tasks (full deck generation) cost 5 credits.
There's nothing to cancel — we don't take a card. When we start charging, you'll be able to cancel any time.

faqItems.q: What does 'Pro' get me that Basic doesn't?
faqItems.a: AI. Pro is the only tier that can generate decks from prompts, suggest options, summarise responses, and clean up word clouds.
Yes. Audience members are identified only by the nickname they choose. Hosts can export results to CSV, Excel, or PDF whenever they want.
